summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OrthoConnect new features (Iteration 10). All features working correctly: Admin Analytics page, CSV Export, Profile Views tracking, Events page, Blog page, Referral system endpoints, PWA manifest, and Service worker.
passed_tests: Admin login with correct password returns token
Admin login with wrong password returns 401
Admin Analytics endpoint returns platform statistics (totals, city_distribution, subspecialty_distribution)
Admin Analytics requires authentication
CSV Export endpoint returns CSV file with proper headers
CSV Export requires authentication
Profile view tracking increments view count
Profile view returns 404 for invalid slug
Events list endpoint returns array (empty state OK)
Admin can create and delete events
Articles list endpoint returns array
Articles can be filtered by category
Admin can create articles
Referral code generation requires surgeon auth
Apply referral code requires surgeon auth
PWA manifest.json served with correct structure
Service worker file served with install/fetch handlers
Admin can update surgeon status (triggers email notification)
API root endpoint working
Subspecialties meta endpoint working
frontend_tests_passed: Admin Analytics page loads with stats cards (Total Surgeons: 10, Approved: 7, Pending: 3)
Export CSV button visible and clickable
Subspecialty Distribution chart visible (Knee: 7, Hip: 3, Sports Medicine: 2)
Events page loads with filters (All, Conference, CME, Workshop, Webinar)
Events page shows empty state correctly
Blog page loads with category filters (All, Patient Education, Industry News, Research, Health Tips)
Blog page displays test article created during testing
Surgeon Portal loads with OTP login form
OTP sent via real SMS (2Factor.in) for valid Indian numbers
Surgeons listing page shows 7 verified surgeons
Doctor profile page loads with trust badges (Admin Verified, Registration Submitted, Location Verified)
Doctor profile shows Contact section with Call Clinic and WhatsApp buttons
Profile view tracking API called on page load
seed_data_creation: Test article created during testing (visible on blog page)

features_verified.profile_views_tracking: ✅ Increments view count on profile visit
features_verified.events_page: ✅ Displays with filters, empty state working
features_verified.email_notifications: ✅ SMTP configured (Zoho Mail), triggered on status change

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 10 are working correctly. Admin Analytics shows 10 total surgeons (7 approved, 3 pending), 2 profile views, 2 cities covered. Events page shows empty state (no events created yet). Blog page shows 1 test article. PWA support is fully configured. Email notifications use Zoho SMTP (info@agileortho.in).
